hero.title: Your Gateway to
hero.desc: We source, export, and deliver quality products across continents. From raw materials to finished goods—one trusted partner for your international trade needs.

services.title: Export & Import Solutions
services.desc: End-to-end trading services tailored for businesses of every scale.
services.sourcing_desc: We identify and secure quality suppliers worldwide. Raw materials, components, or finished products—we find the right source at the right price.
services.export_desc: Seamless shipping, customs clearance, and documentation. We handle FOB, CIF, and door-to-door delivery so you focus on your business.
services.import_desc: Receive goods from any origin. We manage inbound logistics, warehousing coordination, and delivery to your doorstep or warehouse.
services.finance_desc: Flexible payment terms like Letters of credit, and structured deals to support your cash flow.

products.title: Products We Supply
products.desc: Premium product lines with clear specifications and export-ready packaging.

agarbathi.name: Agarbathi (Incense Sticks)
agarbathi.subtitle: Fragrant options, sandalwood, floral; export packaging. Scented incense stick supplier.
agarbathi.spec_1: Available in multiple fragrances; customized branding available.
agarbathi.spec_2: Stick length and burn time as per requirement.
agarbathi.spec_3: Inner + outer packing options (retail / bulk cartons).
agarbathi.spec_4: Quality checks and export documentation support.

matchbox.name: Match Box
matchbox.subtitle: Safety matches in cardboard or metal tin; export-ready packing. Custom printing available.
matchbox.spec_1: Standard and customized sizes (as per order).
matchbox.spec_2: Consistent strike rate with safe storage packing.
matchbox.spec_3: Printed sleeve / box branding and bulk export cartons.
matchbox.spec_4: MOQ and packing details shared before confirmation.

lungi.name: Lungi
lungi.subtitle: Cotton and blended fabrics; assorted patterns and export packing. Traditional wear, unstitched.
lungi.spec_1: Cotton / blended fabric options based on requirement.
lungi.spec_2: Standard lengths and GSM; assorted colors & designs.
lungi.spec_4: Size chart and samples available on request.

turmeric.name: Turmeric Powder
turmeric.subtitle: Clean, consistent quality with food-grade packing. Indian turmeric; curcumin as per requirement.
turmeric.spec_1: Fine grind with consistent color and aroma profile.
turmeric.spec_3: Retail packs and bulk packs available (as per order).
turmeric.spec_4: Lab reports / compliance support on request.

details.heading: Specifications
details.purity_value: Food-grade; curcumin as per requirement; bulk turmeric

dhop.name: Dhop (Cone Incense)
dhop.subtitle: Scented cone incense; natural fragrance, consistent burn. Export-ready dhoop.

why_us.title: Trusted Across the Globe
why_us.reliable_desc: Vetted suppliers and logistics partners in key markets. Quality and on-time delivery are non-negotiable.
why_us.transparent_desc: Clear pricing, honest communication, and full documentation. No hidden costs or surprises.
why_us.scalable_desc: From sample orders to container loads. We scale with your growth and adapt to your requirements.
why_us.points_heading: More reasons to work with us
why_us.point_1: Daily updates on product status during lead time so you stay informed at every step.
why_us.point_2: Dedicated account managers and resources to support your orders and inquiries.
why_us.point_3: End-to-end documentation and compliance support for smooth customs and regulations.
why_us.point_4: Flexible payment terms and structured financing options to support your cash flow.
why_us.point_5: Proactive communication at every stage of the shipment—from sourcing to delivery.

contact.title: Start Your Next Deal
contact.desc: Describe your product needs or request a quote. We respond within 24 hours.
contact.success_msg: Thank you! Your inquiry has been received. We will get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.error_msg: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us via WhatsApp.
contact.message_placeholder: Quantity, destination, Incoterms, or any specifics...
